_comment: P4-04: Adds tags table (id serial PK, name, slug unique, category, timestamps) and product_tags junction (product_id UUID FK cascade, tag_id integer FK cascade, composite PK). Adds expression indexes on products((attributes->>'fabric')) and products((attributes->>'condition')). Full table list is inherited from 0008_snapshot — only deltas are noted here. drizzle-kit generate is bypassed (hand-authored).
